text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During lunch break, I spot Kawakami Princess
looking incredibly drowsy.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, it's no good. Why can't I defeat this
sleepiness with my punches?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She continues to throw out punches, but they
don't seem to have any effect. She must be very
sleep deprived.
